fixture.description: Tiny low-risk source-like documentation fixture used only for the demo apply chain.

stages.summary: Deterministic patch preview targets one allowed low-risk source-like fixture.
File-class report confirms the target is an allowed source-like class.
Independent review is still pending, so the chain cannot reach apply.
blockedReasons: independent review has not accepted the change yet

expectedEvidence.description: Preview evidence captured before the chain blocked on review.

cleanupPolicy: Generated demo previews and evidence stay untracked and git-ignored; only fixture-scoped JSON under examples/ is committed.
boundary: This demo proves a review-gated trusted source apply chain over one allowed low-risk source-like fixture; it is not unrestricted source mutation. There is no auto-apply and no self-approval: independent review required, and rollback and evidence required before any trusted write. Browser read-only or draft-only surfaces cannot apply patches or run commands.
